items.title: WATCH:  Gen Z is hitting life milestone later, experts say

items.title: Russia targets Ukraine with 345 drones and missiles, Zelenskyy says
items.description: "Russia will not stop," said Yulia Svyrydenko, the Ukrainian prime minister.
